tasks.label: verify-swagger-openapi
args: import json, urllib.request; data=json.load(urllib.request.urlopen('http://127.0.0.1:8010/openapi.json')); paths=data['paths']; print('HAS_WSO2_GATEWAY', any('WSO2 Gateway' in op.get('tags', []) for p in paths.values() for op in p.values())); print('WSO2_GATEWAY_LOGIN', paths.get('/api/v1/auth/login', {}).get('post', {}).get('tags')); print('HAS_ROOT_AUTH_LOGIN', '/auth/login' in paths); print('HAS_INTERNAL_LOGIN', '/internal/wso2/login' in paths)
